name: Phony Whipped Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill a small mixing bowl and beaters.
2. In a separate bowl, soften gelatin in cold water. Dissolve it over boiling water.
3. Allow the mixture to cool to tepid.
4. Add iced water and instant nonfat dry milk to the chilled bowl. Beat until stiff peaks form.
5. Continue beating, adding remaining ingredients (including the dissolved gelatin) until well blended.
6. Place the bowl in the freezer for 15 minutes, then transfer to the refrigerator.
7. Occasionally stir gently to keep the mixture smooth and well blended.
Note: Any artificial sweetener liquid or powdered may be used as long as it is equivalent to 3 tablespoons of sugar.
1 serving = 2 Tablespoons (2 exchanges). CHO 1, PRO 1, FAT 1, Cal 15, Na 7
